title: Mystborn Horizons
description: A progression mod to add more ores, mobs, bosses and structures.
body:
![Sparked hosting banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b8a4b01a906d278c5e7fcd9c751a549fc8653c0_0.webp)
⚡ Fast, affordable hosting with Sparked Host

🖥️ Apollo Control Panel + 🌍 10 global locations for reliable servers

💬 Quality support backed by ⭐ 2,000+ positive reviews (4.8 Trustpilot rating)

🎁 Use code Mystborn for 25% OFF → https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=2962

## 📖 What's this mod?
The caves glimmer as Teconic plates shift to create new ores, mobs and EVERYTHING. The world enhances into a new stage...

**A mod to add Ores, Discs, Foods, Effects, Weapons, Structures, Mobs, Bosses, Armor, Enchantments, Advanced Terrain & MORE!**

![Mystborn horizons text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a0f4eeaa312eacfee2bb4517b1b485426c280c7.png)
(This mod was created on March 16, 2025 and is **STILL** under development)

## ✅ Features:

### 💾 Misc:

<details>
<summary>Misc</summary>

- Shard Block functions like magma blocks, but deals more damage and cannot be negated through frost walker.
- Adds 7 new music discs, Titan Sands, Doomsday, Water Horizons, Ender Fury & Echoes of the Abyss, Forest Haven, Night Shackles (Some generated by AI, If you think you can make a worthy song, dm me on discord.)
- New effect, slimy. Slimy allows a player to scale up a wall by running into it. Also adds spore vision that is in the game.
- New Enchantment, Lightning Striker. Summons lightning on each hit equal to the level. (ex: lvl 1 summons 1, lvl 2 summons 2, etc) Is a alternative to sharpness and smite. Great for destroying boats when ppl try to escape on them.

</details>

### 🦄 Mobs:

<details>
<summary>Mobs</summary>

- Mantis, is a peacefull mob and drops nothing. 
  - Spawns in flower forests, plains & cherry grove.
  - Can be bred with cauliflower.
- Copper Bulb, is not a peacefull mob and drops copper or power cores. 
  - Spawns in dripstone caves & lush forests.
- Ice Spider, is not a peacefull mob and drops froststone. 
  - Spawns in dripstone caves & lush forests and any cold biome.
- Basalt Howler, has 2 abilities:
  - Does an AOE attack around it, with particle effects, knocking entities back. Has to charge for about 7 seconds, will emit lava paricles when charging.
  - Does an AOE "howl" attack, applies slowness and weakness for a few seconds to mobs around it.
  - Also has a chance to drop either molten gold blackstone, molten gold basalt, gold ingots & may rarely drop netherite scraps.
  - Doesn't Spawn yet.
- Havenica, a dangerous boss!
  - Spawns when you right click a "Forest Heart" on a ancient grove altar in the moss arena.
    - Has 4 Moves with 20 blocks of range:
      - Root Network gives you slowness and wither while taking away armor durability, but if you avoid standing in the area between the pillars, nothing happens.
      - Shockwave, Sends out 3 waves that through you back & deals damage. You can stand 2 blocks under or 1 block above to avoid the damage, but you can't jump over it.
      - Teleport, Teleports to a nearby haven core.
      - Toxic Laser, shoots 3 beams at you and you have 6 seconds to dodge, otherwise you get nausia, damage & poison.
  - Heals very quickly as long as he doesnt have glowing effect. (Burning gives glowing to him)
  - Enters Garden's Wrath when past 50% of hp. 
  - Attacks grow with the number of nearby players.
  - Heals equal to the number of Haven Orbs nearby.
  - Attack range is 20 blocks, you do not need to be visible to be attacked
</details>


### 💎 Ore Spawning
<details>
<summary>Ore Spawns</summary>

- Froststone spawns in cold ocean, deep cold ocean, frozen river, frozen peaks, snowy plains, snowy slopes, snowy taiga, snowy beach & frozen ocean. Between -80 & 80
- Tectonite spawns in the overworld, between -80 & 80
- Mystborn Dust spawns in the overworld, between -80 & 80
- Moonstone spawns in the overworld, between -80 & -15
- Stormite spawns in the nether, between 80 & 127
- Luminite spawns in the end, between -80 & 80
- Salondite spawns in the overworld, between -80 & 160, in badlands, eroded badlands & wooded badlands biomes.

</details>

### 🔪 Custom Weapons

<details>
<summary>Weapons</summary>
  
- PeaceKeeper Sword, Has 10000 durability and is breakable, And is stronger than a netherite sword. Can be enchanted.
- Vanquisher Sword, Has 10000 durability and is breakable, And is stronger than the PeaceKeeper sword. Can't be enchanted.
- Tomahawk, Has Durability and only deals damage when thrown. Pierces through enemies and can be picked up to use again. Doesn't Return to you automaticaly.

</details>

### 🏛️ Unique New Structures

<details>
<summary>Structures</summary>
  
- Jungle Pyramid, Has normal Jungle Temple Loot.
- Enhanced Witch Hut.
- Ice Tower, has cool loot.
- Myst Chamber Room, Spawns the Copper Bulb
- Mushroom Tower, Spawns the Ocasional Copper Bulb
- Moss Arena, Home of Havenica


</details>

### 💰 New Loot and Drops

<details>
<summary>Loot Tables For Chests</summary>

- Butcher Village Chests:
  - Chicken nuggets & Veggie sandwiches.
- End City Chests: 
  - Ender fury music discs.
- Shipwrecks supply Chests:
  - Cod and salmon nigiri
- Desert Pyramid Chests:
  - Titan sands music discs.
- Desert Village Chests:
  - Titan sands music discs.
- Bastion Treasure Chests:
  - Doomsday music discs and stormite.
- Bastion Bridge Chests:
  - Molten Gold Basalt & Blackstone.
- Stronghold Corridor Chests:
  - Waffles
- Stronghold Crossing Chests:
  - Royal Tectonite Sword
- Trial Chamber Intersection Chests:
  - Raw Salondite and Salondite Ore

</details>

<details>
<summary>Loot Tables For Mobs</summary>

- The Ender Dragon:
  - Ender fury music disc.
- Creepers now drop cauliflower.

</details>

### 🥪  Custom Foods


<details>
<summary>Custom Foods</summary>

- Veggie Sandwich. 
  - Gives Regeneration when eaten. 
  - Crafted from any veggie/crop and 2 pieces of bread.
- Chicken Nugget. 
  - Has a small chance to give slowness when eaten. 
  - Crafted from cooked chicken & wheat
- Cauliflower. 
  - Has a decent chance to give health boost when eaten. 
  - Drops from creepers.
- Waffle. 
  - Has a decent chance to give resistence when eaten. 
  - Can be crafted from egg, sugar & wheat.
- Cod Nigiri. 
  - Has a decent chance to give dolphins grace when eaten. 
  - Can be crafted from raw cod & 3 wheat
- Salmon Nigiri. 
  - Has a decent chance to give conduit power when eaten. 
  - Can be crafted from raw salmon & 3 wheat.
- Honey Berries. 
  - Has a small chance to give instant health when eaten. 
  - Is a bush similar to sweet berries.
- Power Core. 
  - Has a chance to give you golden apple effects but better. 
  - Also has a chance to give bad effects. 
  - Crafted from Froststone, Mystborn Dust & Iron.
 
</details>

## 👀 Usage

Just download this along with the fabric API! Let me know any issues you have on my channel :D

Make sure to use the mod in 1.21.1, it may work in other versions but there is no guarantee.

## 📖 Notes
(ALMOST) Everything is obtainable in survival!
